description: Ancient creatures from before recorded history — dinosaurs, megafauna, and ice age beasts.
creatures: Tyrannosaurus Rex
A massive apex predator with bone-crushing jaws and laughably tiny arms.
Triceratops
A three-horned giant that lowers its armored frill and charges like a living battering ram.
Velociraptor
A cunning pack hunter with sickle claws and the tactical intelligence to set ambushes.
Pteranodon
A leathery-winged reptile that soars on thermals and snatches fish from the water's surface.
Stegosaurus
A plated dinosaur that swings its spiked tail with bone-shattering force.
Brontosaurus
A long-necked titan whose footsteps shake the earth like rolling thunder.
Allosaurus
A towering predator with jaws like a bear trap and claws that rend flesh in long gashes.
Ankylosaurus
A low-slung, armored tank of a dinosaur that shatters legs with its bony tail club.
Dire Wolf
A horse-sized wolf whose coordinated pack hunts bring down mammoths.
Saber-tooth Tiger
A muscular cat with curved fangs as long as daggers, built to pin and puncture.
Mammoth
A shaggy, tusked giant that trudges through blizzards and trumpets across frozen tundra.
Giant Beaver
An oversized rodent that gnaws down whole trees and reshapes rivers with its massive dams.
